# San Mateo Local

> An honest, locally-run guide to San Mateo, California. The restaurants, shops, services, and things to do, all hand-picked by a born-and-raised local, not paid placement. San Mateo Local also builds and hosts affordable websites for local businesses.

## Guide sections
- [Eat & Drink](https://sanmateolocal.com/eat-drink.html): restaurants, coffee, bars, brunch, and bakeries
- [Things To Do](https://sanmateolocal.com/things-to-do.html): parks, trails, the bayfront, family, and entertainment
- [Shopping](https://sanmateolocal.com/shopping.html): independent shops, boutiques, jewelers, and specialty markets
- [Local Services](https://sanmateolocal.com/local-services.html): barbers, salons, dentists, mechanics, plumbers, electricians, and other trades
- [Gone But Not Forgotten](https://sanmateolocal.com/gone-but-not-forgotten.html): a tribute to beloved San Mateo businesses that have closed

## About
San Mateo Local is written and maintained by a born-and-raised San Mateo local. Every listing is a genuine recommendation. The guide covers the city of San Mateo, California (zip codes 94401 through 94403) on the San Francisco Peninsula.
